title: Blackstone-backed Nexus shops for Kolkata mall Diamond Plaza; Khaitan, SAM advise
description: Nexusmalls Whitefield Private Limited, an affiliate of Blackstone Inc. and a SPV of Nexus Select Trust, is set to acquire Super Diamond Enterprises, owner and operator of popular Kolkata mall ‘Diamond Plaza’.The transaction, valued at approximately ₹347.5 crore, involved the divestment of a marquee retail asset in West Bengal and was executed following a restructuring and hiving off of unrelated business.The transaction comprised complex structuring issues, from the conversion of a partnership f
